package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for same_service_method_accepts_tx_and_begins_tx: Service methods that sometimes reuse a transaction and sometimes open one themselves.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule158NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule158NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule158NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario158Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule158NegativeService, input Rule158NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
